latestResult.title: Critique the anatomical plate hero reset and the 1101-1150 wordmark redesign batch
latestResult.summary: Reviewed 9 frontpage concepts (1301-1309), 50 logo options (1101-1150), and the live BrandMark component. The homepage hero structure is typographically clean and the parchment palette is correct, but the right-side illustrations do not read as anatomical plates ΓÇö they are abstract topographic blobs. The logo batch is almost entirely color-variation exhaustion of two mark types (NEURAL ARC and HEARTLINE), producing no new mark geometry. BrandMark.tsx is a dead `` tag with no live SVG mark at all. The system is not yet premium medical illustration; it is still symbolic medical vector art with editorial typography layered on top.
latestResult.suggestedHumanFix: 1) Confirm or create AmbientEditorialHero.tsx and AnatomyGlobeVisual.tsx ΓÇö check if they live under a different path or have not been scaffolded yet. 2) Replace BrandMark.tsx `` with an inline SVG of the HEARTLINE mark ΓÇö extract the heart+ECG paths from chapai-option-1101.svg, drop them inline, and size with viewBox. This is the single highest-leverage 30-minute action in the system right now.
latestResult.nextTask: Generate HEARTLINE logo batch 1151-1160: 10 variants derived exclusively from the cardiac outline + PQRST waveform geometry in 1101. Vary (a) cardiac outline fidelity (add aortic arch, left-ventricle asymmetry), (b) ECG wave type (sine vs real PQRST), (c) mark-to-wordmark scale ratio. Use only teal (#5A7F88), gold (#C59B5E), and near-black (#1F1F21) on parchment (#FBF7F0). Kill all new NEURAL ARC generation.
